name: Frontier AI Discovery
corentisFit: Medium-high if framed as technical R&D rather than a product marketing application.
recommendedCorentisFraming: Corentis ControlBench: a feasibility study for runtime assurance and benchmark testing of agentic AI in regulated workflows.
whyItMatters: This is the currently live cash grant route most suitable for a near-term R&D application if Corentis is framed around technical novelty, benchmark testing, evaluation and runtime control.
cautions: Do not apply as a generic compliance website or dashboard.
Must show R&D uncertainty, feasibility study structure, baseline, evaluation metrics and future Phase 2 route.
Must stay within actual eligibility rules.
immediateAction: Prepare Corentis ControlBench feasibility outline and application evidence.

name: Frontier AI Benchmarking Datasets
corentisFit: Possible but not first priority unless Corentis can join or form a credible consortium.
recommendedCorentisFraming: A regulated AI-agent benchmark dataset for customer-treatment, complaints and vulnerable-customer workflows.
whyItMatters: Could align with ControlBench if framed as evaluation infrastructure, but likely too large or partner-heavy for immediate solo action.
cautions: Do not treat as an easy solo application.
Only pursue if a partner route is realistic.
immediateAction: Monitor and only pursue if a credible partner route emerges.

name: Sovereign AI Fund
opens: No standard grant window currently verified
closes: No standard grant window currently verified
fundingType: Strategic investment / sovereign venture-style backing / compute and support route
corentisFit: High upside if framed as UK AI control infrastructure for regulated AI agents.
recommendedCorentisFraming: Corentis as UK runtime control infrastructure for regulated AI-agent deployment.
whyItMatters: Sovereign AI is active and should be approached like strategic investor/funding outreach, not a standard grant form.
cautions: Need sharper investor deck, technical defensibility and strategic asset framing.
Stronger after V2 live and after first application/design-partner signals.
immediateAction: Prepare strategic memo and short investor-style approach.

name: FCA Supercharged Sandbox
fundingType: Sandbox/support programme, not a cash grant
recommendedCorentisFraming: Runtime checkpointing for AI-assisted complaints and vulnerable-customer workflows in financial services.
whyItMatters: This is a highly credible sector-specific route for testing Corentis with financial-services relevance, especially around agentic AI, compliance agents and customer interaction/service agents.
cautions: Prepare now and submit when the window opens.
immediateAction: Prepare sandbox use-case statement before 5 May 2026.

name: AI Assurance Innovation Fund
opens: First round expected to open in Spring 2026
closes: No verified live application page or closing date yet
recommendedCorentisFraming: Runtime assurance for regulated AI workflows: policy-to-control mapping, checkpoints, human review and evidence artefacts.
whyItMatters: Corentis directly aligns with AI assurance mechanisms, evidence generation and pilotable assurance tooling.
cautions: Do not state it is open until a live application page exists.
Prepare pack now so Corentis can move quickly when it opens.
immediateAction: Prepare assurance mechanism pack and monitor official launch page.

name: Northern Powerhouse Investment Fund II
opens: Ongoing route, no single grant deadline
closes: Ongoing route, no single grant deadline
corentisFit: Useful later after first external signal.
recommendedCorentisFraming: North of England AI assurance/control infrastructure company seeking early growth capital.

cautions: Avoid debt too early unless there is clear repayment logic.
